shortDesc: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokémon.

name: Wonder Skin
desc: Makes status moves more likely to miss the Pokémon.
shortDesc: Makes status moves more likely to miss the Pokémon.

name: Wonderland
desc: Creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.
shortDesc: Creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

name: Xenoluminescence
desc: Psychic moves Link foes. Linked foes lose 1 Sp. Def each turn they stay in; if they switch, the next Pokémon takes 20% max HP damage.
shortDesc: Psychic moves Link foes. Linked foes lose 1 Sp. Def each turn they stay in; if they switch, the next Pokémon takes 20% max HP damage.

name: Zen Domain
desc: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The Pokémon also gradually regains HP in Psychic Terrain.
shortDesc: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The Pokémon also gradually regains HP in Psychic Terrain.

name: Zen Mode
desc: Changes the Pokémon's shape when its HP drops to half or less.
shortDesc: Changes the Pokémon's shape when its HP drops to half or less.

name: Zero to Hero
desc: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.
shortDesc: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.
